root_cause: Agent made two separate exchange calls instead of one combined call with all items, violating the policy that exchange tools can only be called once per order.
explanation: The agent correctly identified the need to exchange two items and had the right parameters, but violated the policy by making two separate exchange_delivered_order_items calls instead of one combined call. This caused the second exchange to fail, leading to an unnecessary escalation to human agents when the task could have been completed successfully with proper tool usage.
